description: Hungover on the retro faux leather fad that's making a comeback? These pair of kitten heels from catwalk induge you with its faux-croc skin upper referencing the fashion era gone by and nailing the one that's just arrived! Wear this with distressed or faded denim jackets, denim skirts or trousers and an understated floral blouse. Heel: 2.5" Upper Soft synthetic leather strap over the forefoot Soft silky lining on footbed Ergonomically curved footbed for ease of wear Outsole TPU outsole with mild ridges on the heel for grip Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
